source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/EN_60SIPT-602230C/EN 301 893 - 60-SIPT_60-2230C - EY740701 R02.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: CE DFS test report for Laird Technologies 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module model ST60-2230C under EN 301 893 V2.1.1.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents DFS channel shutdown compliance test results for the evaluated sample.
keyPoints: Report No. EY740701, Report Version Rev. 02.
ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test and only its data was recorded.
Operating mode at DFS band is client without ad hoc and radar detection function.
Channel shutdown measured result passed and result is stated as complied.

entities.name: Laird Technologies
entities.evidence: Brand Name : Laird Technologies Applicant : Laird Technologies

entities.name: International Certification Corp.
entities.evidence: We, International Certification Corp., would like to declare that the tested sample has been evaluated and in compliance with the requirement of the above standards.

concepts.name: Channel Shutdown
concepts.evidence: 4.2.6.2.5 Channel shutdown Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

concepts.name: Slave without radar detection
concepts.evidence: Operating Mode : Slave without radar detection

concepts.name: Channel Availability Check
concepts.evidence: Channel Availability Check Time 60 seconds (see note 1)

concepts.name: Off-Channel CAC
concepts.evidence: Off Channel CAC Feature Implemented No

evidence.claim: The report is CE DFS Test Report number EY740701, revision Rev. 02.
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: EY740701 Page : 1 of 15 Report Version: Rev. 02 CE DFS Test Report

evidence.claim: The tested equipment is an 802.11 ac/a/b/g/n + Bluetooth 4.2 module.
The cover model number is ST60-2230C.
The applicant and brand name are Laird Technologies.
evidence.evidenceText: Brand Name : Laird Technologies Applicant : Laird Technologies

evidence.claim: The applicable standard is EN 301 893 V2.1.1 (2017-05).
Rev. 02 was issued on Jul. 24, 2017 and revised the model name.
evidence.evidenceText: EY740701 Rev. 02 Revised model name Jul. 24, 2017

evidence.claim: ST60-2230C was selected as the representative model for final test.
evidence.evidenceText: The above models, model ST60-2230C was selected as a representative one for the final test and only its data was recorded in this report.

evidence.claim: The listed product models include ST60-SIPT, SU60-SIPT, ST60-2230C, and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: Brand Name Model Name Product Name Description Laird Technologies ST60-SIPT ... SU60-SIPT ST60-2230C ... SU60-2230C

evidence.claim: The EUT frequency ranges are 5.15~5.25, 5.25~5.35, and 5.47~5.725 GHz.
The operating mode at DFS band is client without ad hoc and radar detection function.
evidence.evidenceText: Operating Mode at DFS Band Client without ad hoc and radar detection function

evidence.claim: Off Channel CAC feature is not implemented.
evidence.evidenceText: Off Channel CAC Feature Implemented No

evidence.claim: DFS requirement values include 60 seconds Channel Availability Check Time, 10 seconds Channel Move Time, 1 second Channel Closing Transmission Time, and minimum 30 minutes Non-occupancy period.
evidence.evidenceText: Channel Availability Check Time 60 seconds ... Channel Move Time 10 seconds Channel Closing Transmission Time 1 second. Non-occupancy period Minimum 30 minutes

evidence.claim: For slave without radar detection, Channel Shutdown is required while CAC, Off-Channel CAC, In-Service Monitoring, Non-Occupancy Period, and Uniform Spreading are not required.
evidence.evidenceText: DFS Operational mode ... Slave without radar detection ... Channel Availability Check Not required ... Off-Channel CAC Not required ... In-Service Monitoring Not required ... Channel Shutdown ... Non-Occupancy Period Not required ... Uniform Spreading Not required

evidence.claim: The summary test result for channel shutdown passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 4.2.6.2.5 Channel shutdown Meet the requirement of limit. Pass

evidence.claim: Channel shutdown result complied with limits of 1 second Channel Closing Transmission Time and 10 seconds Channel Move Time.
The DFS threshold level is listed as -64 dBm.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: the document says CE DFS Test Report but does not identify a regulatory authority.
Conflicting tested-date evidence: cover page states Tested Date Apr. 27, 2017, while equipment list states Tested Date Dec. 10 ~ Dec. 11, 2014.
Some table symbols and spacing appear affected by text extraction, including DFS requirement marks and joined words such as loadingover.
